title: The Quiet Village
target: find out why no smoke has risen from Stelm village in eight days, and bring word back to the fort

contributions.line: Roselle quietly slips along the cart-path, her light-footed agility helping her stay unseen as she approaches the silent village.
Imogen carefully examines the remains of the dead, noting signs of sudden death and the absence of recent activity, suggesting the threat has moved on.

outcomeNarrative: The silent village suggests a swift, unseen threat; Roselle's cautious approach avoided alerting whatever lurked nearby, while Imogen's reading indicates the danger has already left or was never present.
